metadata.name: master
metadata.description: Main development track for QuantStream Analytics Platform

tasks.title: Project Foundation & Infrastructure Setup
tasks.description: Set up the core project structure, development environment, and basic infrastructure components.
tasks.details: This foundational task involves setting up the project structure, development environment, containerization, and basic CI/CD pipeline. Essential for all subsequent development work.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all services start correctly, basic health checks pass, and CI/CD pipeline can build and deploy successfully.

tasks.title: Data Ingestion Pipeline - Core Framework
tasks.description: Implement the core market data ingestion framework with Kafka producers and schema validation.
tasks.details: Build the foundational ingestion service that can handle multiple data sources, validate schemas, and publish to Kafka with exactly-once semantics. Includes circuit breaker patterns and retry logic.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for ingestion components, integration tests with mock data sources, and chaos engineering tests for failure scenarios.

tasks.title: REST API Data Connectors
tasks.description: Implement REST API connectors for EOD data sources (Alpha Vantage, Yahoo Finance).
tasks.details: Create specific connectors for REST API data sources with rate limiting, authentication, and error handling. Support for historical data backfill and incremental updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests with live APIs, mock server tests for edge cases, and rate limiting validation.

tasks.title: WebSocket Real-time Data Feeds
tasks.description: Implement WebSocket clients for real-time market data feeds with connection management.
tasks.details: Build WebSocket clients for real-time data with automatic reconnection, heartbeat monitoring, and subscription management. Handle backpressure and message ordering.
tasks.testStrategy: Real-time data validation, connection failure recovery tests, and load testing with high-frequency data.

tasks.title: Kafka Infrastructure & Configuration
tasks.description: Set up and configure Kafka cluster with proper partitioning, replication, and monitoring.
tasks.details: Deploy Kafka cluster with optimal configuration for financial data workloads. Include schema registry, topic management, and monitoring integration.
tasks.testStrategy: Throughput testing, partition balancing validation, and failure recovery testing.

tasks.title: Delta Lake Bronze Layer Implementation
tasks.description: Implement Delta Lake bronze layer for raw data ingestion with schema evolution support.
tasks.details: Create the bronze layer architecture for storing raw ingested data with ACID guarantees, schema evolution, and efficient querying capabilities.
tasks.testStrategy: Data integrity tests, schema evolution validation, and time-travel query testing.

tasks.title: Stream Processing Pipeline - Core Engine
tasks.description: Implement the core Spark Structured Streaming pipeline for real-time data processing.
tasks.details: Build the foundational streaming engine with windowed aggregations, stateful processing, and exactly-once guarantees. Include watermarking and late data handling.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end pipeline testing, exactly-once semantics validation, and performance benchmarking.

tasks.title: Delta Lake Silver Layer ETL
tasks.description: Implement Silver layer ETL for data cleaning, validation, and deduplication.
tasks.details: Create the silver layer transformation logic for cleaning, validating, and deduplicating data. Include data quality checks and anomaly flagging.
tasks.testStrategy: Data quality validation, deduplication testing, and transformation accuracy verification.

tasks.title: Delta Lake Gold Layer Analytics
tasks.description: Implement Gold layer for aggregated, analytics-ready datasets with optimized queries.
tasks.details: Build the gold layer with pre-aggregated data, Z-ordering for query optimization, and materialized views for common analytics patterns.
tasks.testStrategy: Query performance testing, aggregation accuracy validation, and optimization verification.

tasks.title: Feature Engineering Pipeline
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive feature engineering for technical indicators and market metrics.
tasks.details: Create feature engineering pipeline for technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands), market microstructure features, and cross-asset correlations.
tasks.testStrategy: Feature accuracy validation, performance testing, and historical data consistency checks.

tasks.title: Feature Store Implementation
tasks.description: Build centralized feature store with online/offline serving and point-in-time correctness.
tasks.details: Implement feature store with Redis for online serving, Delta Lake for offline storage, and ensure point-in-time correctness for training data.
tasks.testStrategy: Point-in-time correctness validation, latency testing for online serving, and feature versioning tests.

tasks.title: MLflow Experiment Tracking Setup
tasks.description: Set up MLflow for experiment tracking, model versioning, and lifecycle management.
tasks.details: Configure MLflow tracking server with artifact storage, experiment organization, and integration with feature store and model registry.
tasks.testStrategy: Experiment logging validation, artifact storage tests, and model versioning workflow verification.

tasks.title: Anomaly Detection Model Development
tasks.description: Develop and train anomaly detection models using Isolation Forest and LSTM approaches.
tasks.details: Implement ensemble anomaly detection using Isolation Forest for outlier detection and LSTM for temporal pattern learning. Include model explainability features.
tasks.testStrategy: Model accuracy testing, false positive rate validation, and inference latency benchmarking.

tasks.title: Model Serving Infrastructure
tasks.description: Implement real-time model serving infrastructure with MLflow Models and monitoring.
tasks.details: Build model serving endpoints with sub-50ms latency requirements, A/B testing capability, and drift detection monitoring.
tasks.testStrategy: Latency benchmarking, A/B testing validation, and drift detection accuracy testing.

tasks.title: Monitoring & Observability Stack
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive monitoring with Prometheus, Grafana, and distributed tracing.
tasks.details: Deploy monitoring stack with business metrics, infrastructure metrics, structured logging, and distributed tracing for end-to-end observability.
tasks.testStrategy: Metrics accuracy validation, alerting testing, and dashboard functionality verification.

tasks.title: Security & Compliance Implementation
tasks.description: Implement security measures including TLS, OAuth 2.0, RBAC, and data encryption.
tasks.details: Implement comprehensive security including TLS encryption, OAuth 2.0 authentication, role-based access control, and data encryption at rest.
tasks.testStrategy: Security penetration testing, compliance validation, and access control verification.

tasks.title: Performance Optimization & Tuning
tasks.description: Optimize system performance for 500K+ events/second throughput with <100ms latency.
tasks.details: Performance tuning across the pipeline including Spark configuration, Delta Lake optimization, query tuning, and resource allocation.
tasks.testStrategy: Load testing, throughput benchmarking, latency profiling, and resource utilization analysis.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing Suite
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive testing including unit, integration, chaos engineering, and load testing.
tasks.details: Build complete testing suite with 80%+ code coverage, chaos engineering scenarios, load testing capabilities, and automated regression testing.
tasks.testStrategy: Coverage analysis, chaos testing validation, load testing certification, and regression test execution.

tasks.title: Real-time Dashboard & Visualization
tasks.description: Build real-time dashboard for monitoring platform metrics and anomaly alerts.
tasks.details: Create interactive dashboard showing real-time metrics, anomaly detection results, system health, and business KPIs with sub-second refresh rates.
tasks.testStrategy: Dashboard responsiveness testing, data accuracy validation, and user acceptance testing.

tasks.title: Documentation & Deployment Guides
tasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation including architecture, operations, and user guides.
tasks.details: Complete documentation suite including architecture diagrams, API documentation, operational runbooks, and user guides with interactive examples.
tasks.testStrategy: Documentation accuracy review, example validation, and user testing with documentation.
